title: Plan iteration example
note: Iterating on the transcript-component plan through Q&A, then a rejection+revision cycle when review-in-UI feedback surfaced. Test fixture for the amended ChatTranscript component.

turns.text: Now rewriting the plan to reflect shipped 4a.6 + reusable preview script.

Plan updated. Key changes from the previous draft:

- **Reframed as amendments to shipped 4a.6**, not greenfield — schema, bookmark script, promote script, and `/bookmark` skill already exist and are being edited/relocated.
- **New `scripts/render-transcript.mjs` shared helper** — single source of truth for transcript HTML + CSS, imported by both the preview harness and the future `<ChatTranscript>.astro` component. Render parity is guaranteed by a test gate.
- **New `scripts/preview-transcript.mjs` CLI** — wraps `renderTranscript` in a standalone HTML page, opens in browser, supports `--variant a-h1|a-h2|b-h1|b-h2` for comparing the four icon-pair × header-layout combinations cheaply. `--batch` renders all drafts on one page for session-end review.
- **Promote review is now a browser preview**, not a terminal listing — `promote-transcript.mjs` shells out to the preview harness, the user reviews in-browser, then p/e/r/c from the terminal.
- **Design artefact path** — previews land at `plans/portfolio-stitch-assets/transcripts/preview-*.html`, committable and survives sessions.
- **Memory saved** — `feedback_review_in_ui_component.md` captures the general principle.

Plan approved. The plan file is at `~/.claude/plans/polished-wandering-widget.md`. Ready to start implementation when you give the word — want me to begin with a specific amendment (1/2/3/4), or work through them in order?
bookmark this conversation as an example of iterating on a plan. I will use this as the example to test the amended transcript component, once implemented.
